policy: read-only metadata audit; no source repository mutation

discovery.method: owner-filtered accessible-repository listing, page size 100, offset 0
discovery.purpose: completeness recovery after prior search payload truncation
discovery.result: twenty previously unprocessed owned repositories recovered; inventory remains open

repositories.risk: nonstandard default branch plus possible health/hospital data, credentials and legacy deployment configuration

repositories.name: CMSEcommerce

repositories.name: PythonApplication1

repositories.name: Net5Wasm20210819
repositories.risk: same reported size as 20210818 does not prove duplicate content; exact tree/history comparison required

repositories.name: SASREPORT-final20210825

repositories.name: BlazorShopmosso20210831

repositories.name: BlazorShopmosso20210902
repositories.risk: canonical status, private configuration and relationship to adjacent dated variants require comparison

repositories.name: authentication20210922

material_findings: The completeness recovery listing proved that the prior 198-repository inventory was incomplete and recovered twenty previously unprocessed owned repositories in this batch.
SASERP811V37 is a substantial private ERP-family repository and must be preserved for deep lineage, schema, feature and security comparison against BackEndNet5 and the wider SAS ERP family.
Twilio is a private communications integration candidate with elevated secret, webhook, phone-identifier and messaging-data exposure risk.
HMS2021 uses the nonstandard default branch HMS-20200406 and may contain sensitive hospital/health-domain data; branch discovery must never assume main or master.
authentication20210922 is a large private identity repository requiring dedicated secret, signing-key, user-data and deployment review.
Net5Wasm and BlazorShop families expanded further; filename dates and equal or similar repository sizes remain insufficient for canonical or duplicate decisions.
